basic_details.job_title: GMRC – Asst. Manager, Supervisor and More – 28 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation Limited (GMRC) Recruitment 2026 for 28 Asst. Manager, Supervisor and More Posts. Candidates with B.E/B.Tech Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 03-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through GMRC official website gujaratmetrorail.com.

age_limit.age_details: Revised IDA scale of ₹50000-160000 (Approx. CTC ₹1.2 Lacs per month).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GMRC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: GMRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 28 Asst. Manager, Supervisor and More Posts
